title: Uber, Lyft win court block on NYC law requiring notice before firing drivers
snippet: US District Judge Gregory Woods in Manhattan said in a written ruling on Tuesday that the city's law adopted earlier this year benefits a small fraction of drivers ‌while interfering with ⁠the ⁠ride-hailing companies' right to police the safety of their platforms.

title: Amazon cuts jobs in its artificial general intelligence group
snippet: Artificial general intelligence is a hypothetical AI system that surpasses ‌human intelligence ⁠and can ⁠learn, grow and operate autonomously. Many of the top AI companies ​are working to develop similar systems, with the hope of deploying ​them to solve difficult problems.

title: UK fintech Revolut valuation soars to $115 billion
